commands.name: status-summary
commands.purpose: Summarize accepted baseline, active candidate, current investigation, git state, and DSP/script diff count.
boundaries: read-only
does not create candidates
does not run JDSP measurements

commands.name: ready-check
commands.purpose: Run lightweight local checks for whitespace, helper syntax, accepted baseline presence, command surface, profiles, and eval fixtures.
boundaries: static/docs/tooling readiness only
not a release gate
not a listening or JDSP qualification result

commands.name: local-review
commands.purpose: Run one non-JDSP local evidence snapshot covering git state, accepted baseline, changed paths, guard-check, ready-check, Agentic contract audit, optional Knowledge audit, Python tests, Node harness tests, and recommended next action.
boundaries: non-JDSP local review only
does not create candidates
does not approve publication, merge, or accepted-baseline promotion

commands.name: guard-check
commands.purpose: Preflight changed paths and added lines for accepted-baseline edits, EEL script scope, policy changes, private artifacts, credentials, manifests, and private path leaks.
boundaries: blocks known unsafe publication scope
does not approve safe-looking changes
does not replace human approval gates

commands.name: command-surface
commands.purpose: List the repo-tracked command surface that native aliases or future plugin commands should wrap.
boundaries: registry only
does not install native slash commands

commands.name: agentic-audit
commands.purpose: Validate command registry, runtime mappings, agent profile structure, and skill-eval fixture contracts as one blocking Agentic Layer check.
boundaries: static Agentic Layer validation only
does not run JDSP
does not grant approval or execute registered commands

commands.name: task-state
commands.purpose: Validate and summarize the machine-readable Axiom task state used for planning and future next-action computation.
boundaries: planning metadata only
does not approve DSP or publication decisions
does not replace the human-readable backlog

commands.name: next-action
commands.purpose: Recommend the next safe Axiom work item from task-state metadata, current working-tree state, blockers, approval gates, and optional maintenance opt-in.
boundaries: planning guidance only
initial-maintenance tasks require explicit opt-in
does not run JDSP
does not approve publication, merge, listening, or baseline changes

commands.name: agent-profiles
commands.purpose: List role-specific Codex profile specs or print one profile by role.
boundaries: Codex planning and review scope only
Pi role prompts remain the execution-layer source

commands.name: agent-review
commands.purpose: Create a validated multi-role review record grounded in local Codex profiles and Pi role docs.
boundaries: draft record is not evidence until completed
findings must cite concrete repo state or measurement artifacts

commands.name: airwindows-audit
commands.purpose: Validate the local Airwindows metadata index and report whether its pinned commit matches the optional local checkout.
boundaries: read-only audit
does not fetch or update Airwindows
does not approve DSP reuse or candidate creation

commands.name: airwindows-index
commands.purpose: Create a local-only metadata index from a pinned Airwindows checkout for clean-room concept retrieval.
outputs: effect names, relative upstream paths, and concept tags
boundaries: does not vendor Airwindows code
does not store source snippets or local paths
does not approve DSP reuse or candidate creation

commands.name: knowledge-query
commands.purpose: Search repo-safe Knowledge notes and optional local-only source metadata without exposing private paths by default.
boundaries: Knowledge can inform tests
Knowledge is not proof of Axiom behavior
private paths hidden unless explicitly requested

commands.name: knowledge-sources
commands.purpose: Audit the local-only Knowledge source index, local file existence, and matching repo-safe notes without exposing private paths by default.
outputs: local file and repo note status
boundaries: does not copy PDFs into git
does not expose private paths by default
does not turn research into Axiom evidence

commands.name: evidence-catalog
commands.purpose: Discover normalized qualification bundles, validate them, select the newest valid record, and optionally configure its directory for automatic Codex orientation.
boundaries: does not print or commit the configured directory
does not ingest raw reports
does not grant listening acceptance or release approval

commands.name: evidence-ingest
commands.purpose: Normalize local Windows soak and manual-recovery reports into a compact qualification evidence bundle for agent review.
inputs: one or more supported local JSON qualification reports
outputs: normalized gates, metrics, warnings, and decisions
boundaries: does not run JDSP or alter the audio route
does not expose private paths by default
does not treat automation as listening acceptance
does not create or promote a candidate, release, or accepted baseline

commands.name: evidence-status
commands.purpose: Validate and summarize a normalized local qualification evidence bundle for Codex orientation and planning.
boundaries: read-only local evidence review
does not expose source paths
does not convert automation into listening acceptance
does not authorize publication or baseline promotion

commands.name: pi-handoff
commands.purpose: Route real-JDSP measurements, candidate creation, qualification, publication, and merge workflows to the controlled Pi harness.
boundaries: Codex must not run competing real-JDSP captures
candidate and publication paths require explicit user approval
raw artifacts remain local

commands.name: session-log-update
commands.purpose: Record completed workflow changes in the Markdown session log and regenerate the repo and Windows PDF copies.
boundaries: document completed work only
do not claim validation that did not run
do not include private paths or raw artifact details

commands.name: skill-eval
commands.purpose: Run deterministic fixture checks that the installed skill source has command mappings and behavior terms for representative Axiom prompts.
boundaries: static skill-behavior fixture only
not a model-quality benchmark
not DSP evidence
